results.title: IAEA produces global map of used nuclear fuel
results.description: The global total of used nuclear fuel produced by nuclear power plants is about 448,000 tonnes of heavy metal, with three quarters in storage and one quarter reprocessed, according to the International Atomic Energy Agency's first interactive tool showing how much used nuclear fuel the world has - and where it is now stored.

results.title: The Mossos are investigating the discovery of a body on L2 of the metro
results.description: The Mossos d'Esquadra have opened an investigation after receiving a report on Sunday night that a body had been found on Metro line L2 in Badalona, as reported by Metropoli and confirmed by ARA. At the moment, it is unknown whether it was an accidental death, a suicide, or a possible homicide.

results.title: North West Air Ambulance announces relaunch of Base to Base Ride Out for2026
results.description: The North West Air Ambulance Charity (NWAA) has announced the relaunch of its popular Base to Base Ride Out for 2026, with the event now taking place on Sunday September 20 following the postponement of the original April date.

results.title: Navy rescues three from capsized boat in Warri
results.description: The Nigerian Navy has rescued three passengers from a capsized boat along the Bennett River in Warri, Delta State, and recovered more than 63,000 litres of suspected illegally refined petroleum products during separate operations under Operation Delta Sentinel. The post Navy rescues three from capsized boat in Warri appeared first on Vanguard News .
